{
  "verdict": "reject",
  "preserved": [
    "Backend list route functionality",
    "Backend artifact route functionality"
  ],
  "regressions": [
    "Top filter buttons: Two buttons do not fire events (broken interactivity)",
    "Button styling: Colors are muted and appear disabled, violating the 'readable and not disabled-looking' requirement for inactive states",
    "Typography: Font stack was changed from the accepted prototype",
    "UI Scope: Extra gradient cards added that were not in the accepted design"
  ],
  "required_fixes": [
    "Restore event listeners to all top filter buttons",
    "Update button CSS to ensure inactive states are readable and distinct from disabled states, while active states use bright primary/white treatment with strong contrast",
    "Revert font stack to match the selected prototype",
    "Remove unauthorized gradient cards"
  ],
  "tests_to_run": [
    "Unit test: Verify click events fire on all top filter buttons",
    "Visual regression test: Compare button colors against high-contrast dark mode specifications",
    "Accessibility audit: Check contrast ratios for active and inactive buttons",
    "Integration test: Confirm backend list and artifact routes still return expected data"
  ]
}
